text: Literally, ‘Nor did he lay his hand upon those of the children of Israel who had withdrawn far away; and they saw God, and ate and drank’. It is possible to understand this phrase as referring to the main body of the Israelites, who had remained at the foot of the mountain, cf. Ex. 32.6. But this is not the sense of the Hebrew text, which alludes (most probably) to the ‘leading men among the children of Israel’.
